data.current_description: Retrieves comprehensive historical flight event data with additional flight and aircraft details such as origin, destination, and aircraft type.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve comprehensive historical flight event data
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves comprehensive historical flight event data including gate departure, takeoff, landing, and other flight events with additional flight and aircraft details such as origin, destination, and aircraft type. Returns an array of flight events with full details including timestamps, event types, and associated aircraft information.
